property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Users\a951957\Downloads\OpenJDK11U-jdk_x64_windows_hotspot_11.0.30_7\jdk-11.0.30+7\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-25.0.2.10-hotspot\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Pulse Secure\VC142.CRT\X64\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Pulse Secure\VC142.CRT\X86\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Pulse Secure\TNC Client Plugin\;C:\Users\a951957\AppData\Local\Programs\Karate;C:\Users\a951957\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\a951957\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\a951957\AppData\Local\Python\bin;C:\Users\a951957\Downloads\apache-maven-3.9.14-bin\apache-maven-3.9.14\bin;C:\Users\a951957\AppData\Local\Programs\Git\cmd;;.

testcase.name: [1:4] Simple GET request
testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: status code was: 200, expected: 304, response time in milliseconds: 654, url: https://postman-echo.com/get?foo1=bar1&foo2=bar2, response: {"args":{"foo1":"bar1","foo2":"bar2"},"headers":{"host":"postman-echo.com","x-forwarded-proto":"https","accept-encoding":"gzip, br","user-agent":"Apache-HttpClient/4.5.14 (Java/11.0.30)"},"url":"https://postman-echo.com/get?foo1=bar1&foo2=bar2"} classpath:example.feature:7 at com.intuit.karate.junit5.FeatureNode.lambda$next$1(FeatureNode.java:86) at java.base/java.util.stream.ForEachOps$ForEachOp$OfRef.accept(ForEachOps.java:183) at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline$3$1.accept(ReferencePipeline.java:195) at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline$2$1.accept(ReferencePipeline.java:177) at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline$3$1.accept(ReferencePipeline.java:195) at java.base/java.util.Iterator.forEachRemaining(Iterator.java:133) at java.base/java.util.Spliterators$IteratorSpliterator.forEachRemaining(Spliterators.java:1801) at java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.copyInto(AbstractPipeline.java:484) at java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.wrapAndCopyInto(AbstractPipeline.java:474) at java.base/java.util.stream.ForEachOps$ForEachOp.evaluateSequential(ForEachOps.java:150) at java.base/java.util.stream.ForEachOps$ForEachOp$OfRef.evaluateSequential(ForEachOps.java:173) at java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.evaluate(AbstractPipeline.java:234) at java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline.forEachOrdered(ReferencePipeline.java:502) at java.base/java.util.Optional.ifPresent(Optional.java:183) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1541) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1541)
